mounted_note: Rigidly mounted on graspable 'tray'. RLBench re-places 'tray' each episode at a random position within its spawn region and a random yaw (RLBench default +/-pi). This object sits ~0.0 m from 'tray' rotation axis, so its absolute world position sweeps a wide ring; its pose relative to 'tray' is fixed.
name: tray_visual
